name: Orientation Week Kickoff
description: Welcome ceremony for the incoming batch of 2026. Includes an address by the Vice-Chancellor, campus tour signups, and a student-club showcase in the lobby.

name: Workshop: Practical Machine Learning with PyTorch
description: Hands-on, 3-hour workshop covering data loading, model training, and deployment basics using PyTorch. Bring your own laptop; GPUs will be available via the campus cluster.

name: Rhythmia 2026 — Annual Cultural Fest
description: Three-day cultural extravaganza featuring band performances, classical dance competitions, stand-up comedy, and a DJ night. Day 1 opens with the Battle of Bands.

name: Guest Lecture: Sustainable Urban Engineering
description: Dr. Meera Kapoor (IIT Bombay) discusses green building standards, urban heat-island mitigation, and wastewater recycling in smart cities. Open to all departments.

name: Inter-College Basketball Tournament
description: Two-day round-robin tournament with 8 colleges competing. Finals on Aug 3 at 16:00. Free entry for spectators; players must register via the Sports Office.

name: Hackathon: Code for Change
description: 24-hour hackathon themed around civic-tech solutions. Teams of 2-4 build prototypes addressing public transportation, waste management, or citizen safety. Prizes worth ₹1,00,000.

name: Undergraduate Research Symposium
description: Students present original research papers across STEM and humanities tracks. Best Paper awards in each track. Abstract submission deadline: Aug 1.

name: Alumni Networking Mixer
description: Informal meet-and-greet with alumni from the classes of 2016-2022 working in fintech, consulting, and deep-tech startups. Light refreshments provided.

name: Blood Donation Drive
description: Organized in partnership with the Red Cross. All healthy donors (18+) welcome. Free hemoglobin check and refreshments post-donation.

name: Open Mic & Poetry Night
description: An intimate evening of spoken word, poetry, and acoustic music. Sign up for a 5-minute slot at the Literary Society desk or just come to listen.
